description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push events. Run a job on an ubuntu-latest environment with PostgreSQL and MariaDB services. Check out the repository, display the GitHub reference, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, and run tests against SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MariaDB databases. Additionally, lint the code with flake8, build a distribution, and publish it to PyPI if the push event is a tag.
